title: VeloxQuant-MLX: Fast KV-Cache Quantization for Apple Silicon
description: Fast KV-cache quantization for Apple Silicon (MLX) — 37 research-adapted compression methods, from TurboQuant and KIVI to KVzip, with Metal kernels. Compresses the Key/Value cache of mlx_lm models up to 16x with near-lossless quality via a common three-line API.
